no: Divine Remix by Andyr/CamDawg. AD&D sphere-based divine magic overhaul with deity-specific kits. MAJOR CONFLICTS with Faiths & Powers (sphere system overlap) and Talents of Faerun (divine revisions). All three rewrite cleric/druid spell access. Choose ONE divine overhaul system. Not . Individual kits add 1 slot each (10 cleric + 5 druid/ranger = 15 kit slots if all installed).

conflicts.reason: Spell Revisions and Divine Remix are incompatible
Both overhaul divine spell spheres. FnP sphere system is incompatible with Divine Remix sphere assignments.
conflicts.theirComps: #80 Sphere System #31 Cleric Kits #33 Druid Kits

conflicts.reason: Choose one "add Priest (or Battleguard) of Tempus kit"
Both change Viconia's class/kit. Choose one method.
Both modify cleric/druid speciality priests and spell tables
conflicts.theirComps: #40610 Druid cleric tables #40650 Speciality priests #50400 New priest gods

conflicts.reason: Reported incompatible by LCC-docs database (lcc id 314 vs 297)
Install-order supersession: if Divine Remix #605 is installed first, cdtweaks #4050 auto-skips via !MOD_IS_INSTALLED predicate. The tp2 comment reads 'exact same thing from DR'.

sum: Overhauls divine spellcasting with 24 components: new priest kits, revised spell spheres, and deity-specific spell access based on AD&D rules.

co.no: Overwrite spells from other mods with DR's versions. Choose one: this or cn:11. More aggressive — replaces existing spell files.
co.tp2n: Overwrite spells from other mods

co.n: Only add spells if not present from other mods
co.no: Only add DR spells if not already present from other mods. Choose one: this or cn:10. Safer — respects existing spell mods like IWDification/MiH SP.
co.tp2n: Only add spells if not present from other mods
Remove Only Mod Kits
Remove All Kits
Remove Only Mod Kits
Remove All Kits
Remove Only Mod Kits
Remove All Kits
Remove Only Mod Kits
Remove All Kits

co.no: Cleric Remix (conventional): Revises vanilla cleric kits with AD&D sphere system. Deity-specific spell access. Choose one: this or cn:101 (all kits). CONFLICTS with Faiths & Powers sphere system and ToF divine revisions — all three rewrite cleric spell tables.
co.tp2n: Use conventional format for cleric kits

co.no: Install ALL cleric kits at once (unconventional). Alternative to cn:100. Adds all DR kits in one go. Choose one: this or cn:100 + individual kits. CONFLICTS with F&P and ToF.
co.tp2n: Use new format for cleric kits

co.n: Install Silverstar of Selune Cleric Kit
co.no: Silverstar of Selune — moonlight/protection themed cleric. Requires Cleric Remix (cn:100 or cn:101). Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install Silverstar of Selune Cleric Kit

co.n: Install Nightcloak of Shar Cleric Kit
co.no: Nightcloak of Shar — darkness/stealth themed cleric. Requires Cleric Remix. Required for cn:610 (Viconia kit). Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install Nightcloak of Shar Cleric Kit

co.n: Install Holy Strategist of the Red Knight Cleric Kit
co.no: Holy Strategist of the Red Knight — tactical/warfare themed cleric. Requires Cleric Remix. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install Holy Strategist of the Red Knight Cleric Kit

co.n: Install Battleguard of Tempus Cleric Kit
co.no: Adds Battleguard of Tempus cleric kit. War/combat focused divine caster.
co.tp2n: Install Battleguard of Tempus Cleric Kit

co.n: Install Painbearer of Ilmater Cleric Kit
co.no: Painbearer of Ilmater — suffering/endurance themed cleric. Requires Cleric Remix. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install Painbearer of Ilmater Cleric Kit

co.n: Install Firewalker of Kossuth Cleric Kit
co.no: Firewalker of Kossuth — fire/elemental themed cleric. Requires Cleric Remix. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install Firewalker of Kossuth Cleric Kit

co.n: Install Authlim of Iyachtu Xvim Cleric Kit
co.no: Authlim of Iyachtu Xvim — tyranny/evil themed cleric. Requires Cleric Remix. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install Authlim of Iyachtu Xvim Cleric Kit

co.n: Install Lorekeeper of Oghma Cleric Kit
co.no: Lorekeeper of Oghma — knowledge/divination themed cleric. Requires Cleric Remix. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install Lorekeeper of Oghma Cleric Kit

co.n: Install Heartwarder of Sune Cleric Kit
co.no: Heartwarder of Sune — love/beauty themed cleric. Requires Cleric Remix. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install Heartwarder of Sune Cleric Kit

co.n: Install Feywarden of Corellon Cleric Kit
co.no: Feywarden of Corellon — elven/nature themed cleric. Good for Yvette NPC. Requires Cleric Remix. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install Feywarden of Corellon Cleric Kit

co.n: Install Strifeleader of Cyric Cleric Kit
co.no: Strifeleader of Cyric — strife/chaos themed cleric. Requires Cleric Remix. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install Strifeleader of Cyric Cleric Kit

co.n: Install Holy Justice of Tyr Cleric Kit
co.tp2n: Install Holy Justice of Tyr Cleric Kit

co.no: Druid Remix: Loosens alignment restrictions, enforces stricter druid armor rules. Standalone from Cleric Remix. CONFLICTS with F&P and ToF druid revisions.
co.tp2n: Druid Remix

co.no: Oozemaster — druid kit focused on ooze/slime magic. Requires Druid Remix (cn:200). Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install Oozemaster Druid kit

co.no: Bowslinger — ranger kit specialized in ranged combat. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install Bowslinger Ranger Kit

co.no: Feralan — feral ranger kit with animal companion focus. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install Feralan Ranger Kit

co.no: Forest Runner — fast scout ranger. Similar to Artisan's Kitpack Wilderness Runner. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install Forest Runner Ranger Kit

co.no: Justifier — lawful ranger focused on justice. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install Justifier Ranger Kit

co.no: Wilderness Runner — nature-themed ranger. Name conflicts with Eldritch Magic's Wilderness Runner. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install Wilderness Runner Ranger Kit

co.n: Install Battleguard of Tempus Kit for Branwen
co.no: Assigns Battleguard of Tempus kit to Branwen NPC.
co.tp2n: Install Battleguard of Tempus Kit for Branwen

co.no: Changes Jaheira's alignment to Neutral Good. Requires Druid Remix (cn:200). FORBID cdtweaks cn:4050 (similar tweak). Standalone NPC tweak.
co.tp2n: Change Jaheira to Neutral Good

co.n: Install Nightcloak of Shar Kit for Viconia
co.no: Assigns Nightcloak of Shar kit to Viconia. Thematic — Viconia worships Shar.
co.tp2n: Install Nightcloak of Shar Kit for Viconia

co.n: Implement Sphere System for Regular Divine Spells
co.no: Core sphere system. Restricts divine spells by deity sphere access. REQUIRED for sphere-based kits.
co.tp2n: Implement sphere system for regular divine spells

co.n: Implement sphere system for High-Level Abilities
co.tp2n: Implement sphere system for High-Level Abilities

co.n: Alternative Item Usability Scheme for Cleric Kits
co.tp2n: Alternative Item Usability Scheme for Cleric Kits

co.no: Install ALL druid and ranger kits at once. Alternative to individual kit selection below.
